task_objective: 8-Second Video Prompt - Transform 3 images (inspiration → sketch → campaign) into cinematic video prompt, auto-detect product category, English-only, no reasoning

input_assets.inspiration_image: Image 1 Inspiration - Color palette, textures, mood, pattern, artistic aesthetics
input_assets.sketch_image: Image 2 Design Sketch - Structural outline, proportions, silhouette, design framework (auto-detected: garment/shoes/nail/accessory)
input_assets.campaign_image: Image 3 Rendered Campaign - Product in final styled setting, model/subject, lighting, atmosphere

workflow.step_1: Auto-detect product category from 3 images (garment/footwear/nail art/accessory/etc.), extract: Image 1 inspiration aesthetics, Image 2 sketch structure, Image 3 campaign atmosphere
workflow.step_2: Build 8-second timeline with category-adapted transitions: [0s-2s] Image 1 inspiration → Image 2 sketch morphing, [2s-5s] Image 2 sketch → 3D render with material simulation, [5s-8s] render → Image 3 campaign grand reveal
workflow.step_3: Output complete English video prompt with fluid organic transitions, particle dissolves, liquid motion, camera movements, style keywords

prompt_structure.opening: A cinematic 8-second [auto-detected category] video with fluid organic morphing transitions.
prompt_structure.segment_1: [0s-2s: Inspiration → Sketch] Close-up of Image 1. Visual elements detach and swirl, dissolving into luminous ink particles that flow into design outline matching Image 2 sketch. [Camera movement]. [Lighting/mood].
prompt_structure.segment_2: [2s-5s: Sketch → Render] Image 2 sketch breathes to life — colors bloom like watercolor, materials cascade with liquid motion, 2D sketch transforms to 3D realistic product. [Camera movement]. [Atmosphere].
prompt_structure.segment_3: [5s-8s: Grand Reveal] Rendered product flows into reality, scene expands revealing final styled presentation matching Image 3 campaign. [Camera movement]. [Cinematic atmosphere].
prompt_structure.closing: Style keywords: [3-5 keywords]. Camera: [summary]. Transitions: fluid organic morphing, particle dissolves, liquid motion.

output_requirements: Output ONLY English video prompt, no reasoning/explanation; each segment must explicitly specify which Image (1/2/3) is referenced
Auto-detect product category from images and adapt all descriptions accordingly (garment→fabric drape, footwear→sole curve, nail→gloss texture, etc.)
8-second timeline [0s-2s]/[2s-5s]/[5s-8s], each segment: subject + dynamic action + camera movement + lighting/atmosphere
Fluid organic transitions between segments: particle dissolves, liquid motion, flowing morphing — NO hard cuts
Consistent subject + object permanence to prevent artifacts; ONE camera movement per segment; avoid multiple subjects simultaneously; include style keywords + camera summary at end
